docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKPABLIE, PAUL-MIKI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,651.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1651.00 AND HAVE THE PEST CONTROL CHARGES REVERSE & STOP ALL COLLECTION ACTION. IF COLLECTION CANNOT BE STOPPED DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF AN ADDITIONAL $1,175. ALSO, DEFENDANT MUST REVERSE THE $1,175.00 CHECK FOR PEST CONTROL SPRAYING AND STOP ALL COLLECTION ACTIONS IMMEDIATELY. IF COLLECTION CANNOT STOPPED THEN DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF THE MONEY SO THAT PLAINTIFF CAN PAY THE COLLECTION AGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,636.16 FILED BY AKPABLIE, PAUL-MIKI AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $76.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROBERT BLASKEY FILED BY DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PAUL-MIKI AKPABLIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES. LLC IS PRESENT. APPEARING IN COURT FOR THE DEFENDANT IS ROBERT BLASKEY. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
